description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot surrounded by a wooden fence and lush landscaping. The structure features flat roofs, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a mix of brick and white wall finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool and open green spaces with palm trees and shrubs. The layout is open and linear, with multiple rooms visible through expansive glass panels, allowing for abundant natural light. The property is bordered by a paved sidewalk and driveway, enhancing its urban integration. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a wooden fence and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, and main entryway, with palm trees and a clear view of the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, linear layout, extensive windows, and the backyard pool area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard pool, patio area, and the rear facade with large glass doors and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side lawn, additional windows, and the full length of the bungalow along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
